title: Intense Briny Argentinian Shiitake Mushrooms Empanadas
description: A traditional Argentinian dish featuring shiitake mushrooms, these empanadas are briny and springy, perfect for meal prep and jain-friendly, A delicious and savory pastry filled with intense flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, and sugar.
Add the vegetable oil and brine to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
In a separate pan, heat the oil and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms and paprika to the pan and cook until the mushrooms are tender.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle and place a tablespoon of the mushroom mixture in the center.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of oil and bake for 20 minutes.
